source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 	id,
lds_id,
cst_id,
creditscore,
leadscore,
CreatedDate,
ModifiedDate,
CreatedBy,
ModifiedBy,
Experian_CreditScore,
Experian_CreditRating,
Ren_CreditRating,
Division,
LP_id,
LP_lds_id,
LP_cst_id,
class,
prob
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	CONCAT(Division,'-',id) as id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) as lds_id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',cst_id) as cst_id,
	creditscore,
	leadscore,
	CreatedDate,
	ModifiedDate,
	CreatedBy,
	ModifiedBy,
	Experian_CreditScore,
	Experian_CreditRating,
	Ren_CreditRating,
	Division,
	id as LP_id,
	lds_id as LP_lds_id,
	cst_id as LP_cst_id,
	class,
	prob,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC) AS RW
	from ZML.LP_FHI_rrt_RenuityRatings
	) A1
WHERE RW=1

/*
UNION


SeLECT 	id,
lds_id,
cst_id,
creditscore,
leadscore,
CreatedDate,
ModifiedDate,
CreatedBy,
ModifiedBy,
Experian_CreditScore,
Experian_CreditRating,
Ren_CreditRating,
Division,
LP_id,
LP_lds_id,
LP_cst_id,
class,
prob
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	CONCAT(Division,'-',id) as id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) as lds_id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',cst_id) as cst_id,
	creditscore,
	leadscore,
	CreatedDate,
	ModifiedDate,
	CreatedBy,
	ModifiedBy,
	Experian_CreditScore,
	Experian_CreditRating,
	Ren_CreditRating,
	Division,
	id as LP_id,
	lds_id as LP_lds_id,
	cst_id as LP_cst_id,
	NULL as class,
	NULL as prob,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC) AS RW
	from ZML.LP_MXH_rrt_RenuityRatings
	) A1
WHERE RW=1

*/

Union 


SeLECT 	id,
lds_id,
cst_id,
creditscore,
leadscore,
CreatedDate,
ModifiedDate,
CreatedBy,
ModifiedBy,
Experian_CreditScore,
Experian_CreditRating,
Ren_CreditRating,
Division,
LP_id,
LP_lds_id,
LP_cst_id,
class,
prob
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	CONCAT(Division,'-',id) as id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) as lds_id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',cst_id) as cst_id,
	creditscore,
	leadscore,
	CreatedDate,
	ModifiedDate,
	CreatedBy,
	ModifiedBy,
	'0' as Experian_CreditScore,
	NULL as Experian_CreditRating,
	Ren_CreditRating,
	Division,
	id as LP_id,
	lds_id as LP_lds_id,
	cst_id as LP_cst_id,
	NULL as class,
	NULL as prob,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC) AS RW
	from ODS.LP_PBC_rrt_RenuityRatings
		) A2
WHERE RW=1


UNION

lds_id,
cst_id,

Division,

prob

	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC) AS RW

			) A3
WHERE RW=1

Union

	creditscore,

	from ODS.LP_CTA_rrt_RenuityRatings
	) A1
WHERE RW=1

lds_id,
cst_id,
creditscore,
leadscore,
CreatedDate,
ModifiedDate,
CreatedBy,
ModifiedBy,
Experian_CreditScore,
Experian_CreditRating,

Division,
LP_id,
LP_lds_id,
LP_cst_id,
class,
prob
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	CONCAT(Division,'-',id) as id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',lds_id) as lds_id,
	CONCAT(Division,'-',cst_id) as cst_id,
	creditscore,
	leadscore,
	CreatedDate,
	ModifiedDate,

	) A1
WHERE RW=1

UNION

SELECT 	id,
lds_id,
cst_id,
creditscore,
leadscore,
CreatedDate,
ModifiedDate,
CreatedBy,
ModifiedBy,
Experian_CreditScore,
Experian_CreditRating,
Ren_CreditRating,
Division,
LP_id,
LP_lds_id,
LP_cst_id,
class,
prob
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	CONCAT(Division,'-',id) as id,

	creditscore,
	leadscore,
	CreatedDate,
	ModifiedDate,

	Experian_CreditRating,
	Ren_CreditRating,
	Division,
	id as LP_id,
	lds_id as LP_lds_id,
	cst_id as LP_cst_id,
	class,

	) A1
WHERE RW=1

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ZML.DIM_RENUITYRATINGS')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ZML.DIM_RENUITYRATINGS

scripts.text:
Update EDW.[DIM_RENUITYRATINGS] Set Ren_CreditRating=  CASE 
																		WHEN Creditscore ='A' THEN 'A'
																		WHEN Experian_Creditrating ='A' THEN 'A'
																		WHEN Creditscore ='B' and Experian_Creditrating in ('B','C','D','U') THEN 'B'
																		WHEN Creditscore ='C' and Experian_Creditrating in ('C','D','U') THEN 'C'
																		WHEN Creditscore ='D' and Experian_Creditrating in ('D','U') THEN 'D'
																		WHEN Experian_Creditrating ='B' and Creditscore in ('B','C','D','U') THEN 'B'
																		WHEN Experian_Creditrating ='C' and Creditscore in ('C','D','U') THEN 'C'
																		WHEN Experian_Creditrating ='D' and Creditscore in ('D','U') THEN 'D'
																		WHEN Experian_Creditrating ='U' and Creditscore in ('A','B','C','D') THEN creditscore
																		WHEN Creditscore ='U' and Experian_Creditrating in ('A','B','C','D') THEN Experian_Creditrating
																		WHEN Creditscore ='U' and Experian_Creditrating ='U' THEN 'U'
																		ELSE 'U'
																		END 
						  where Division='MXH'
